Contractor-grade categories.

Wholesale inventory

Procurement-ready categories for professional landscapes.

Browse the core product groups and send project quantities when you need a confirmed availability list.

Availability changes by dig window, hold status, and delivery timing. Lists are confirmed against current field and yard stock.

High availability

Deciduous Trees

Field-grown maples, oaks, lindens, serviceberries, and flowering trees selected for Ontario streetscapes, commercial landscapes, and long-term estate plantings.

Check deciduous availability
Moderate availability

Evergreens

Hardy conifers and broadleaf evergreens for privacy screening, windbreaks, institutional planting, and high-impact commercial entrances.

Request evergreen list
High availability

Shrubs

Landscape-grade shrubs sourced for reliable establishment across residential developments, public sites, and commercial planting programs.

Build a shrub quote
Seasonal availability

Perennials

Durable perennial selections that support texture, pollinator value, and repeatable planting palettes for professional landscape teams.

View perennial timing
Limited availability

Soil Blends

Professional soil blends and landscape materials that support planting performance from the first backfill through establishment.

Ask about soil supply
Why Ontario-grown

Trees arrive already fluent in the climate they are planted into.

Local cultivation gives contractors and municipalities a more reliable starting point: stronger establishment, better seasonal timing, and fewer surprises after installation.

Ontario-grown trees

Grown through Ontario temperature swings, wind exposure, and freeze-thaw cycles before installation.

Imported alternatives

Often arrives from softer growing regions and adjusts after the client has already paid for the install.

Route coverage

Southern Ontario supply coordination

Built for contractors who need stock, timing, and transport to line up cleanly.

Delivery and logistics

A wholesale workflow built around the realities of install day.

From plant-list intake to staged delivery, INL supports professional buyers who need dependable material, clear timing, and operational follow-through.

01

Plant list intake

Send species, sizes, quantities, timing, and substitution notes.

02

Availability hold

Stock is checked against field, yard, and seasonal dig timing.

03

Delivery staging

Loads are coordinated around site readiness and contractor sequencing.

04

Regional routing

Cambridge-based logistics support projects across Southern Ontario.

Wholesale program

Priority support for buyers responsible for real landscapes.

Contractors, municipalities, garden centers, and landscape teams get quote support, availability updates, logistics coordination, and Ontario-grown material selected for durability.

Start a wholesale quote

Wholesale ready

Plant lists, substitutions, holds, and delivery timing in one procurement conversation.

Farm gallery

A working nursery with the scale to support serious projects.

Rows, root systems, seasonal stock, and the quiet precision behind wholesale nursery supply.

Imagery is loaded responsively and only expanded into a lightbox when buyers want a closer look.

Request availability

Send us your plant list and we’ll build your quote.

Share species, sizes, quantities, substitutions, and timing. INL can confirm availability and coordinate the next step for your project.

905-330-6112treefarm@islingtonnurseries.com

Fastest quote format

Include plant names, sizes, quantities, site location, desired delivery or pickup window, and acceptable substitutions.

Tree Farm Updates

Stock timing, planting windows, and wholesale updates for professional buyers.
